events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday today, having sold over 100 million records worldwide.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Lionel
angles.copy: Seventy-seven years young today! We're celebrating the one and only Lionel Richie with a non-stop playlist of his greatest hits.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: The iconic Cyndi Lauper, known for her vibrant style and powerful vocals, celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper! Still shining bright and bringing all the fun.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Today would have marked the 63rd birthday of the late, great George Michael, born Georgios Kyriacos Panayiotou on June 25, 1963.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: Remembering the phenomenal George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: It's 17 years since the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, tragically passed away on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Tribute
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's legacy lives on through his timeless music.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr – still drumming up a storm.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Brian May
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the maestro, Sir Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and rock icon.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The irrepressible frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched, forever changing the music landscape, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first broadcast.

angles.name: MTV's Iconic Launch
angles.copy: The day the video star was born! Remembering MTV's launch in '81 with The Buggles' iconic first video.

events.title: Anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, becoming an instant Britpop classic.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Still sounding absolutely biblical. Celebrating Oasis' debut album 'Definitely Maybe' and its enduring impact.

events.title: Anniversary of Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music Anniversary
angles.copy: Three days of peace and music. Remembering the iconic Woodstock Festival and its lasting cultural impact.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: It's 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Always on our minds. Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years since we lost the King of Rock and Roll.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's shooting
events.blurb: On September 7, 1996, iconic rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, tragically passing away on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the immense talent and enduring legacy of Tupac Shakur, 30 years since the tragic events in Las Vegas.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: It's 56 years since the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Still electrifying generations. Remembering the unparalleled guitar genius, Jimi Hendrix, on the anniversary of his passing.

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that unforgettable zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. Still one of the most iconic albums and album covers ever.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chrissie Hynde
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking and rolling with that unmistakable voice.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The outspoken and charismatic former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday LG
angles.copy: Fifty-four years of pure rock 'n' roll attitude. Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! As you were.

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine' single (UK re-release)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK in 1975, following its initial US single release on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Imagine all the people... still living for today. Remembering John Lennon's powerful message with 'Imagine'.

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod release
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: The Original iPod
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped and put '1,000 songs in your pocket.' Remember life before it?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune? Licence to thrill all day long.
